hero.title: Who we are
hero.subtitle: Your trusted partner for vehicle registration in Rheine & Kreis Steinfurt.

intro.text: For over ten years, we have been firmly rooted in the local community – and for the past five years, we have also been actively involved in vehicle registration services and DEKRA-certified license plate embossing. What began as a passion for cars has evolved into a modern, reliable vehicle registration service with comprehensive support.

experience.title: Built on real experience
experience.text: Our experience is no accident: Through privately buying and selling around 80 vehicles, we have developed a deep understanding of all the processes, challenges, and details surrounding vehicles. We have incorporated this knowledge into our business – with the goal of making things as easy as possible for our customers.

services.title: What we offer
services.text: Today, we offer much more than just standard vehicle registration:
items: We handle all registration matters – from initial registration, deregistration, and re-registration to changes of ownership.
Whether it's a car, motorcycle, motorhome, or specialty vehicle – you're in the best hands with us.
Online deregistration is also a standard part of our service.
We take care of technical modifications and reliably accompany our customers to their vehicle inspection appointments.
We prepare everything in advance so you don't have to worry about a thing – quickly, easily, and professionally.

team.title: Our team
team.text: Our company is backed by three women from Rheine: dedicated, competent, and with a strong network and direct connections to the vehicle registration office. We know what matters – and we are passionately committed to your needs.

promise.title: Our promise
promise.text: Maximum service, minimal waiting time – and the peace of mind of not having to lift a finger.
